##RRUFFID=R060524

##LOCALITY=Moctezuma mine, Moctezuma, Sonora, Mexico
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Michael Scott
##DESCRIPTION=Pale yellow rosette associated with green emmonsite, R060802

##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Powder, using Mo radiation

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
